metadata.description: Maxim commercial pack marketplace. 14 packs across 3 tiers: L1 capabilities, L2 persona bundles, L3 verticals. Licensed per-purchase via Stripe (primary; LemonSqueezy secondary, dormant until v1.0.1 per ADR-011), validated via Cloudflare Worker RS256 JWT.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l1-1-ai-governance
plugins.description: Audit trail, confidence tagging, and ethical checks on every AI decision your operator produces. Primary framework: Prospect Theory.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l1-2-mempalace-pro
plugins.description: Cross-session memory that resumes your project where you left it, not where the base voice assumes. Primary framework: Cognitive Load Theory.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l1-3-proactive-watch
plugins.description: Eight drift classes scanned continuously. Catches regressions before they ship. Primary framework: Signal Detection Theory.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l1-4-compliance-shield
plugins.description: 14 regulated-industry frameworks enforced on every output. Audit-ready on demand. Primary framework: COM-B.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l1-5-brand-design-pro
plugins.description: Your brand voice locked across AI outputs. 15 cinematic styles. Design that does not read as AI. Primary framework: Dual Process Theory.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l1-6-behavioral-intelligence
plugins.description: 64 peer-reviewed behavioral frameworks applied to every Maxim output. The flagship moat. Primary framework: Fogg Behavior Model (B=MAP).

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l2-1-founder-os
plugins.description: Persona bundle for solo founders. Combines L1 capabilities for founder-stage operators at 47% off individual L1 pricing.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l2-2-growth-stack
plugins.description: Persona bundle for growth-stage teams. Marketing, brand, behavioral science at scale.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l2-3-professional-os
plugins.description: Professional tier. Full L1 suite for solo consultants and boutique agencies.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l2-4-agency-all-in
plugins.description: Full L1 suite plus all six L1 packs. Agency tier with unlimited operator seats.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l3-1-healthcare
plugins.description: Vertical overlay for healthtech. HIPAA, ISO 13485, ISO 14971 enforcement. One-time purchase.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l3-2-legal
plugins.description: Vertical overlay for legaltech. Privileged communication protection, privacy frameworks, conflict-of-interest patterns. One-time purchase.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l3-3-fintech
plugins.description: Vertical overlay for fintech. PCI-DSS, SOC 2, FINTRAC, PIPEDA enforcement. One-time purchase.

plugins.name: mxm-pack-l3-4-govtech
plugins.description: Vertical overlay for govtech. NIST CSF, FedRAMP, government records retention. One-time purchase.
